title: Weekly Insights Review
summary:
Read here everything you need to know


Latest Trends on fuel transition, shipyard actions, government, ports, financing and industry players. The transition of the shipping industry to green future is in full force with 63% of orders for newbuilding vessels this year to have been for alternative fuel capable units. LNG remains the leading alternative fuel today, featuring in 59% of orders in 2022 so far where as it factored into just 28% of orders last year.

LNG remains the leading alternative fuel today, featuring in 59% of orders in 2022 so far where as it factored into just 28% of orders last year.

children.title: Shipments growing in May
children.summary:
As weather in Brazil starts to subside and the end of the financial year for several miners approaches, we look at the iron ore market and what may be in store going forward. Read More
Image reference: unsplash-image-zlAYqbb36Ts.jpg | assets/2022-05-22_weekly-insights-review_img_unsplash-image-zlayqbb36ts_a7a61e693e70.jpg

children.title: First global grain export forecast for the upcoming 2022/23 season
section_path: First global grain export forecast for the upcoming 2022/23 season
children.section_path_text: First global grain export forecast for the upcoming 2022/23 season
children.summary: The United States Department of Agriculture (USDA) recently released their first global grain export forecast for the upcoming 2022/23 season. The forecast is still very preliminary, but of note is that only 487.3 million tons of exports are expected.

children.title: Giant leap for woman
children.summary:
In October of 1974, five previously all-male colleges of the University of Oxford admitted female undergraduates for the first time in its 878 years of history. Read More
Image reference: unsplash-image-wTxlrY3nNto.jpg | assets/2022-05-22_weekly-insights-review_img_unsplash-image-wtxlry3nnto_27958a20b8ea.jpg

children.title: Investors shrugged off concerns of weaker economic growth
section_path: Investors shrugged off concerns of weaker economic growth
children.section_path_text: Investors shrugged off concerns of weaker economic growth
children.summary: As we move into the second quarter of this year, we analyse the effects of recent developments on the tonne-mile demand of crude and clean tanker fleets. Individual crude tanker classes are indicating a tonne-mile trend reversal, as well as clean LR tankers, while MRs have shown signs of continued strength in the months ahead.

children.title: Losing around 25% of the value on the most heavily traded route worldwide
section_path: Losing around 25% of the value on the most heavily traded route worldwide
children.section_path_text: Losing around 25% of the value on the most heavily traded route worldwide
children.summary:
Image reference: 1.jpg | assets/2022-05-22_weekly-insights-review_img_1_a6f53bb13b27.jpg
After a short-lived spike during the start of April, VLCC rates have tumbled, losing around 25% of the value on the most heavily traded route worldwide.
